MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-21-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Andrew Chew, Esq. of Brayton & Purcell, 415-898-1555 moving to be relieved as counsel for plaintiff Clifton Woodworth, et al

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER. THE COURT GRANTED Andrew Chew, Esq. of Brayton & Purcell's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR PLAINTIFFS CLIFTON WOODWORTH, ALETA WOODWORTH, VALERIA BOEN, LINETTE ANDRES, RICHARD WOODWORTH, GREGORY WOODWORTH, LAWRENCE WOODWORTH COUNSEL CONFIRMED THAT THE CLIENT WILL BE APPRAISED OF THE ORDER GRANTING THE WITHDRAWAL OF COUNSEL.
